title: Spec-Link Checker Config
description: Shared configuration for scripts/check-spec-links.mjs and scripts/report-spec-links-ci.mjs. Underscore-prefixed sibling fields (e.g. _excludeDirsNote) are documentation comments and are ignored at runtime.

excludeDirs.description: Directory NAMES (not paths) that are skipped during recursive scanning. Matched anywhere in the tree.

autoResolve.description: Settings for the suffix-overlap auto-resolver that downgrades fixable broken links from errors to warnings.

searchRoots.description: Roots used to build the basename → absolute-path index for candidate replacements.
